reviews.review_description:
I was so excited to see a fencing app, and immediately bought it.  When it opened, it was sideways in my roomspace, and I could find no way to adjust it.  More importantly. I'm left handed, and thats pretty important when fencing.  There does not appear to be a way to adjust to left handedness.

Maybe this game could be great...but its not ready as it is, and im disappointed to see that they are charging for a game that doesn't have basic functions yet.

I'm requesting a refund.
Needs big fixing. Was looking forward to it. Wasted my money. Should have listen to the previous review!!!

This game doesn't seem to simulate the physics of a fencing match at all.  Is it just me?  It didn't feel real.  The game was so unsatisfying that I thought maybe I didn't know how to use the controls properly.  If this is so, I saw no instructions or training offered in the game, so I'm deleting it.
